examples: He calls it captainitis because, he says, "crew members of multi-pilot aircraft exhibit a sometimes deadly passivity when the flight captain makes a clearly wrong-headed decision".
That passivity is almost certainly temporary.
Yet a destructive passivity has overtaken our discourse.
"This is a significant and dramatic indicator of the Obama administration's passivity, " said Sen.
In recent years, corporate governance advocates have pushed for reforms to combat this passivity.
